# OMNET IT Solutions

> CERT-In empanelled IT services, cybersecurity, cloud, and hardware supplier
> in Delhi NCR. Headquartered at Nehru Place, New Delhi. Founded 2016 by
> Dauly Kumari. Serves 500+ businesses across Noida, Delhi, Gurugram,
> Ghaziabad, Sahibabad and Faridabad. 4-hour onsite SLA. 24×7 helpdesk.
> Standard contract SLAs: P1 30-min response / 4-hr resolution; P2 2-hr / 1
> business day; P3 4-hr / 2 business days; P4 1 / 5 business days.

## Contact
- Phone (sales): +91-89206-03270
- Phone (customer service): +91-99717-76428
- Phone (24×7 technical support): +91-98183-91080
- Office (Noida landline): +91-120-522-3376
- Email: hello@omnetit.in
- Office: 405B, Skylark Building, 60 Nehru Place, New Delhi 110019, India
- Hours: Mon–Sat 9:00–19:00, Sun 10:00–17:00 IST

## Trust signals
- CERT-In empanelled (Indian Computer Emergency Response Team, MeitY, Government of India)
- 4.9 / 5 from 147 verified Google reviews
- Microsoft 365 partner
- Google Workspace partner
- Apple Business Manager partner
- Authorised reseller for Dell, HP, Lenovo, Cisco, Sophos, SonicWall, Fortinet
- ISO 27001 readiness assessor

## Core services

- [Managed IT Services](https://www.omnetit.in/managed-services.html): per-user-per-month outsourced IT department for 25–250-person businesses. Helpdesk, endpoint management, identity, security, cloud admin, vendor management, vCIO advisory.
- [IT AMC (Annual Maintenance Contract)](https://www.omnetit.in/computer-amc-services.html): fixed-cost maintenance with defined scope and written SLA. Best for offices that already know their footprint and need reliable break-fix and helpdesk.
- [Cybersecurity Services](https://www.omnetit.in/it-security.html): CERT-In empanelled audits, XDR (CrowdStrike Falcon, Sophos XDR, Microsoft Defender XDR), MFA, SSO, conditional access, vCISO, ISO 27001 readiness, incident response, DPDP Act compliance.
- [Cloud Services](https://www.omnetit.in/cloud-services.html): Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Microsoft Azure, AWS — design, migration, identity (Microsoft Entra ID, JumpCloud), device management (Microsoft Intune, Apple Business Manager), licensing optimisation.
- [Networking, WiFi & Cabling](https://www.omnetit.in/networking-cabling-wifi-noida.html): site survey, structured cabling, WiFi 6 deployment (Cisco Meraki, Aruba, Ubiquiti UniFi, Ruckus), firewall configuration (SonicWall, FortiGate, Cisco), VLAN design.
- [Server Installation & Management](https://www.omnetit.in/managed-servers.html): Dell PowerEdge, HP ProLiant, Lenovo ThinkSystem rack and tower servers; Active Directory, virtualisation (Hyper-V, VMware), backup (Veeam, Acronis, Datto).
- [Email Solutions](https://www.omnetit.in/email-solutions.html): Microsoft 365 mail, Google Workspace mail, anti-phishing, DMARC/DKIM/SPF, email continuity.
- [Data Recovery](https://www.omnetit.in/data-recovery-noida.html): hard drive, SSD, RAID, NAS data recovery for Delhi NCR.
- [Repair Services](https://www.omnetit.in/repair-services.html): MacBook, laptop, desktop, printer repair across Delhi NCR.
- [IT Hardware Rental](https://www.omnetit.in/it-hardware-rental.html): laptops, desktops, servers, MacBooks on rent for short-term and project use.

## Pricing

- Fixed AMC (10–30 users): typically ₹35,000–₹60,000 per month
- Managed IT Standard (30–60 users): typically ₹80,000–₹1,40,000 per month
- Managed IT + Security (60–150 users): typically ₹1,75,000–₹3,00,000 per month
- vCISO add-on: ₹40,000–₹85,000 per month
- One-off cybersecurity audit (50 users): ₹85,000–₹1,50,000
- Project-based work: scoped quotations within 24 hours
